required_preferences.fact: Exclusively chooses low-impact workouts like swimming, walking, or gentle stretching — avoids all high-intensity and impact activities until cleared by physician

supersedes.fact: Chooses low-impact workouts like elliptical or swimming for most exercise sessions — saves high-intensity for basketball only

required_preferences.fact: Prefers high-stakes mainstage conference presentations and external HR keynote sessions over routine in-house training; proactively seeks high-profile speaking opportunities.

supersedes.fact: Now conducts large group presentations and virtual training sessions for company-wide HR and payroll system integration — rarely uses small groups except for specialized follow-ups.

required_preferences.fact: Prepares all weekday lunches at home — avoids cafeteria and fast food entirely
Shares highlights and industry insights from HR conferences with management and peer team leads within a week of returning — always prepares a takeaway memo.
Checks in daily (by phone or video call) with HR leads at newly assigned facilities to monitor labor relations issues firsthand
Does daily stretching routines before office hours to manage lower back pain

persona: A mid-level HR manager at a regional manufacturing company
